findings.location: s3 キャッシュタイミング制御 tip
findings.description: The tip in the source explicitly states '原則起動時に一括ロードで問題ない' (bulk load at startup is the recommended default), which is missing from the knowledge file. The knowledge file only describes when to choose on-demand load, omitting the guidance that bulk load is generally fine and is the default choice.
findings.source_evidence: 原則起動時に一括ロードで問題ないが、静的データが大量で一部しか使用しない場合には、オンデマンドロードを選択すると良い。

findings.description: The source 使用方法 h2 section contains two substantial h3 subsections ('任意のデータをキャッシュする' and 'データのキャッシュタイミングを制御する'), and the total plain text length is well over 2000 characters. These two subsections have distinct topics and were not split into separate knowledge sections.
findings.source_evidence: 使用方法 section has h3 subsections: '任意のデータをキャッシュする' and 'データのキャッシュタイミングを制御する', each with significant content.

findings.description: The class 'BasicApplicationInitializer' appears in the XML configuration example in s3 but is absent from the hints list for that section.
findings.source_evidence: class="nablarch.core.repository.initialization.BasicApplicationInitializer" appears in the 設定ファイル例 XML snippet.
